observation: The journal and raw-slot archive existed and were validated after the one-shot study. Both paths were absent after later Playwright verification cleaned the ignored test-results tree.

cause.description: Playwright output-directory cleanup removed the study artifacts because they were stored beneath examples/web/test-results.

response: The v2 study was not rerun.
The missing artifacts were not reconstructed.
The immutable aggregate evidence and frozen manifest were preserved.
The conservative NOT_YET_FEASIBLE decision was retained, but v2 is not described as fully retained or independently auditable from raw execution artifacts.
